But these toggles affect all buttons in the row, not individual buttons. So I can't selectively turn ON/OFF individual buttons on the left side.
This suggests that the left side's buttons are not the main puzzle. Maybe the left side is just a "control panel" that affects the right side's puzzle.
Let me think about this differently. The bottom squares might represent a "mapping" between the left and right sides. The yellow dots indicate which buttons on the left side correspond to which buttons on the right side.

Actually, I realize I don't know the initial state of the left side's buttons. Let me check the history.

The initial state of row 33 is unknown, but it was likely all OFF (www).
